name: Sri Manakula Vinayagar Temple
description: An incredibly historic Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Ganesha, existing since before the French arrived in Puducherry. The temple is famous for its golden chariot and the temple elephant, Lakshmi.
history: Surviving multiple attempts at destruction during the colonial era, it remains one of the most culturally significant sites in the French Quarter.
famousFor: Golden chariot, ancient idol, and intricate ceiling murals.
